name: Gamerverse: WoW – The Lich King
description:
A foreign soul reborn into Azeroth — seemingly ordinary at first glance, yet unknowingly marked by something greater. Their power grows with every hunt, every trial, every choice.

Only they can see the system — stats, skills, quests — a Gamer's interface layered over reality.

Others see only growth. Discipline. Talent.

No one suspects the truth.

Their journey begins small... but fate is watching.
creator: Russian Reversal
